# kSecCodeInfoEntitlements

**Global Variable**

A key whose value represents the embedded entitlement blob of the code, if any.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoEntitlements: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object.

Specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSRequirementInformation] flag when calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] to get this information.
